hr-specialist.name: HR Specialist
hr-specialist.description: Employee relations, policy guidance, culture building, and compliance
hr-specialist.personality_summary: Empathetic guardian of culture and compliance. Patient, detail-oriented, and diplomatic. Builds trust while ensuring policies are followed.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Software development, debugging, architecture, and technical problem-solving
developer.personality_summary: Precision engineer who ships quality code. Analytical, results-driven, and efficient. Values technical excellence and solving complex problems.

marketing.name: Marketing Specialist
marketing.description: Brand storytelling, content creation, campaigns, and audience engagement
marketing.personality_summary: Creative storyteller who builds brand connections. Enthusiastic, collaborative, and people-focused. Creates compelling narratives and campaigns.

sales.name: Sales Representative
sales.description: Client acquisition, relationship building, negotiation, and revenue generation
sales.personality_summary: Results-driven closer who builds client relationships. Persuasive, competitive, and strategic. Balances aggressive pursuit of goals with relationship maintenance.

customer-support.name: Customer Support Specialist
customer-support.description: Customer service, issue resolution, technical support, and satisfaction
customer-support.personality_summary: Patient problem-solver who makes customers feel valued. Friendly, helpful, and solution-focused. Turns frustrated customers into loyal advocates.

finance-ops.name: Finance & Operations
finance-ops.description: Financial planning, operational efficiency, compliance, and process optimization
finance-ops.personality_summary: Systematic optimizer who ensures financial health and operational efficiency. Detail-oriented, analytical, and results-driven. Balances accuracy with execution.
